g.onclick: sendPrompt('What four fields does a draft ticket card show?')
g.text: Title · Type · Priority · Status: draft (no assignee field)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does edit work before and after approval?')
sendPrompt('What is the change note and where does the user see it?')
sendPrompt('When is regenerate available and what locks it?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the regenerate modal?')
sendPrompt('How does the two-step assign and approve flow work?')
sendPrompt('What is in the assignment dialog — why no estimated time?')
sendPrompt('What does discard do and when is it hidden?')
sendPrompt('What happens when admin clicks Final Approve?')
g.text: Regenerate + Assign&Approve + Discard all hidden permanently

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the approved ticket card show that the draft card did not?')
g.text: Title · Type · Priority · Assignee name (now visible) · Status: approved
Edit only · Regen hidden · Assign&Approve hidden · Discard hidden
Draft: Edit · Regenerate · Assign&Approve · Discard all available
Approved: Edit only (change note req) · All others permanently hidden
Assignee name appears on card only after approve

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an approved ticket appear for the team member?')
g.text: Approved ticket → visible to assigned team member
Appears in their ticket list immediately
